channel.title: 算法 on The Blog of housirvip
channel.description: Recent content in 算法 on The Blog of housirvip

item.title: manacher算法
item.description: 原题再现 LeetCode problem No.5 Given a string s, find the longest palindromic substring in s. You may assume that the maximum length of s is 1000. 从字符串s中找出最长的回文子串，s的长度不会超过1000 Example: Input: “babad” Output: “bab” Note: “aba” is also a valid answer. Example:

item.title: KMP算法个人理解
item.description: 简介 KMP算法是一种改进的字符串匹配算法，由D.E.Knuth，J.H.Morris和V.R.Pratt同时发现，因此人们称它为克努特—莫里
